screens.name: Songs detail page shell
screens.purpose: Preserve the existing page shell around the user-governed alphaTab score.

ux_rules: The Design Agent has no authority over the rendered Songs score surface.
Do not redesign, replace, restyle, or critique alphaTab score composition.
Preserve the current title, artist, analysis digest, page gutter, loading state, and error state.
Treat chord-only content, four measures per system, full-width systems, final padding, and hidden left labels as user-approved technical requirements rather than design judgments.

screen_contexts.layout_intent: Keep the existing shell unchanged and allow alphaTab to fill the available score container.
interaction_risks: A surrounding page change could reduce the width available to alphaTab.
A review role could incorrectly treat the score surface as design-owned.
notes: The rendered score is explicitly excluded from Design Agent intervention by user direction.
Score compliance is owned by the technical specification and Verifier.

constraints: Do not alter the surrounding page design.
Keep alphaTab as the score renderer.
Apply the chord-only and four-measure rules through AlphaTex input, alphaTab settings, and score stylesheet policies.
Do not introduce a custom score renderer.
Do not add global theme variables or score-surface styling chosen by the Design Agent.

critical_judgments: The surrounding title and metadata shell is unchanged.
The alphaTab container still receives the full available pane width.
Loading and error states remain available.

visual_constraints: No Design Agent-authored changes inside the alphaTab score surface.
Preserve the current alphaTab notation design.
Browser evidence is required only to verify the user-approved technical score contract and unchanged page shell.
